name: Team RWBY: Loyal
description:
(REQUEST!) You took the blow in Yang's place, losing an arm. After the team reunited in Mistral, they're worried for your well-being, knowing any pacifying claims you'd make hid the true pain beneath. They're going to help you.

No matter what.

https://www.comicsbeat.com/dc-rooster-teeth-rwby-genlock-comics/
creator: Jack4884
